description: A junior technician accidentally bulk-deleted active network switches while trying to clear out old e-waste. Recover the following active assets from the deleted assets: SW-CORE-01 (Cisco Catalyst 9300), SW-CORE-02 (Cisco Catalyst 9300), and SW-DIST-01 (Cisco Catalyst 9200). Do not restore the laptop LAPT-OLD-99 (Lenovo ThinkPad T460). Once restored, check out all three network switches to the Location "MDF - Data Center" with the note "Restored after accidental deletion incident".
